tags.query:
SELECT TOP 1
    ShiftNumber
FROM (
    SELECT
        1 AS ShiftNumber,
        CAST('06:00:00' AS TIME) AS StartTime,
        CAST('14:00:00' AS TIME) AS EndTime
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        2 AS ShiftNumber,
        CAST('14:00:00' AS TIME) AS StartTime,
        CAST('22:00:00' AS TIME) AS EndTime
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        3 AS ShiftNumber,
        CAST('22:00:00' AS TIME) AS StartTime,
        CAST('06:00:00' AS TIME) AS EndTime
) AS Shifts
WHERE
    (
        StartTime < EndTime AND
        CONVERT(TIME, GETDATE()) >= StartTime AND
        CONVERT(TIME, GETDATE()) < EndTime
    )
    OR
    (
        StartTime > EndTime AND
        (
            CONVERT(TIME, GETDATE()) >= StartTime OR
            CONVERT(TIME, GETDATE()) < EndTime
        )
    )
ORDER BY ShiftNumber;
tags.name: Shift

tags.query:
WITH ActiveSolPerCTE AS (
	SELECT
		Step_Number,
		ActiveSolPer / 100.0 AS AdjustedSolPer,
		ChargeNumber
	FROM
		ChemicalData
	WHERE
		ChargeNumber = {[.]../Charge Number}
)
SELECT cd.Chemical_Name, cd.Step_Number, qc.solStart3, qc.solFinish3,
	qc.totalLbsGauge3 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 3), 1) AS totalLbsGauge3Final,
	qc.totalLbsAdj3 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 3), 1) AS totalLbsAdj3Final,
	qc.retGauge3 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 3), 1) AS retGauge3Final,
	qc.retAdj3 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 3), 1) AS retAdj3Final,
	qc.StripFactor3
FROM ChemicalData as cd
INNER JOIN QC_Data as qc
ON cd.ChargeNumber = qc.chargeNumber
WHERE cd.ChargeNumber = {[.]../Charge Number} AND cd.Step_Number = 3
tags.name: Chemical 3 Usage

tags.query:
WITH ActiveSolPerCTE AS (
	SELECT
		Step_Number,
		ActiveSolPer / 100.0 AS AdjustedSolPer,
		ChargeNumber
	FROM
		ChemicalData
	WHERE
		ChargeNumber = {[.]../Charge Number}
)
SELECT cd.Chemical_Name, cd.Step_Number, qc.solStart5, qc.solFinish5,
	CASE
		WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5)
		THEN qc.totalLbsGauge5 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5), 1)
		ELSE 0
	END AS totalLbsGauge5Final,
	CASE
		WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5)
		THEN qc.totalLbsAdj5 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5), 1)
		ELSE 0
	END AS totalLbsAdj5Final,
	CASE
		WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5)
		THEN qc.retGauge5 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5), 1)
		ELSE 0
	END AS retGauge5Final,
	CASE
		WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5)
		THEN qc.retAdj5 / COALESCE((SELECT AdjustedSolPer FROM ActiveSolPerCTE WHERE Step_Number = 5), 1)
		ELSE 0
	END AS retAdj5Final,
	qc.StripFactor5
FROM ChemicalData as cd
INNER JOIN QC_Data as qc
ON cd.ChargeNumber = qc.chargeNumber
WHERE cd.ChargeNumber = {[.]../Charge Number} AND cd.Step_Number = 5
tags.name: Chemical 5 Usage

# Penetration Failed - valueChanged Script
	# Re-evaluate pass/fail when penetration data changes

	full_tag_path = "[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Production/Post Treatment"
	db_name = "__SITE_SHORT__"
	logger = system.util.getLogger("PenetrationFailedScript")

	# --- Loading guard: skip script execution during historical data upload ---
	# When uploadQC is loading historical values, this flag is True.
	# Skip pass/fail evaluation so we don't clobber the loaded Result value.
	try:
		loading_flag = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Loading In Progress"])[0].value
		if loading_flag:
			logger.info("Loading In Progress flag is True - skipping script execution")
			return
	except Exception as e:
		logger.warn("Could not read Loading In Progress flag: " + str(e))
	# --- End loading guard ---

	try:
		chargeNumber = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Chemical Usage/Charge Number"])[0].value
		if chargeNumber:
			result = qualityControl.passfail.evaluatePassFail(full_tag_path, db_name, chargeNumber, debug=True)
			logger.info("Pass/Fail result: %s" % str(result))
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Pass/Fail evaluation error: %s" % str(e))

eventScripts.script:
"""
	Assay Preservative RAW - valueChanged Script
	Location: Tag Event Script on [SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Production/Post Treatment/Quality Control/Assay Preservative RAW

	Operator enters RAW analyzer reading here.
	Script calculates ADJUSTED values with QC factors, then evaluates pass/fail.
	"""

	full_tag_path = "[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Production/Post Treatment"
	db_name = "__SITE_SHORT__"
	logger = system.util.getLogger("RawAssayPreservativeScript")

	# --- Loading guard: skip script execution during historical data upload ---
	# When uploadQC is loading historical values, this flag is True.
	# Skip all recalculation and pass/fail evaluation so we don't clobber loaded values.
	try:
		loading_flag = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Loading In Progress"])[0].value
		if loading_flag:
			logger.info("Loading In Progress flag is True - skipping script execution")
			return
	except Exception as e:
		logger.warn("Could not read Loading In Progress flag: " + str(e))
	# --- End loading guard ---

	raw_value = currentValue.value

	# Handle clear/zero
	if raw_value is None or raw_value == 0:
		logger.info("RAW Assay Preservative cleared")
		system.tag.writeBlocking([
			full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Preservative Adjusted",
			full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Co Bioside RAW",
			full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Co Bioside Adjusted"
		], [0.0, 0.0, 0.0])
		
		try:
			chargeNumber = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Chemical Usage/Charge Number"])[0].value
			if chargeNumber:
				qualityControl.passfail.evaluatePassFail(full_tag_path, db_name, chargeNumber, debug=True)
		except Exception as e:
			logger.error("Pass/Fail evaluation error: %s" % str(e))
		
		return

	# Read QC Factors and Ratio
	try:
		qc_factor_pres = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/QC Factor Preservative"])[0].value
		qc_factor_bio = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/QC Factor Co Boiside"])[0].value
		ratio = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Ratio Co Bioside"])[0].value
		
		if qc_factor_pres is None or qc_factor_bio is None or ratio is None:
			logger.error("One or more QC factors/ratio is None")
			return
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Error reading QC factors: %s" % str(e))
		return

	# Check for chemicals that have NO co-biocide calculation:
	# - ECO (but NOT EL2 - EL2 has co-biocide)
	# - BORATE / DOT / BORON
	chem_name_tag = full_tag_path + "/Chemical Usage/Chemical Name[1]"
	skip_cobioside = False
	try:
		chem_name_result = system.tag.readBlocking([chem_name_tag])[0]
		if chem_name_result.quality.isGood():
			chem_name = chem_name_result.value
			chem_upper = str(chem_name).upper() if chem_name else ""
			
			# ECO (but not EL2) has no co-biocide
			is_eco = "ECO" in chem_upper and "EL2" not in chem_upper
			
			# Borate chemicals have no co-biocide
			is_borate = "BORATE" in chem_upper or "DOT" in chem_upper or "BORON" in chem_upper
			
			skip_cobioside = is_eco or is_borate
			logger.info("Chemical Name[1]: '%s', is_eco: %s, is_borate: %s, skip_cobioside: %s" % (chem_name, is_eco, is_borate, skip_cobioside))
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Error reading Chemical Name[1]: %s" % str(e))

	# Apply QC Factor to preservative
	adjusted_preservative = raw_value * (1 + qc_factor_pres * 0.01)
	adjusted_preservative = float("{0:.4f}".format(adjusted_preservative))

	# Calculate RAW co-biocide (zero for ECO and Borate)
	if skip_cobioside:
		raw_cobioside = 0.0
		logger.info("Chemical has no co-biocide component - Co-Biocide set to 0")
	else:
		raw_cobioside = raw_value * (ratio - 1)
		raw_cobioside = float("{0:.4f}".format(raw_cobioside))

	# Apply QC Factor to co-biocide
	adjusted_cobioside = raw_cobioside * (1 + qc_factor_bio * 0.01)
	adjusted_cobioside = float("{0:.4f}".format(adjusted_cobioside))

	logger.info("RAW Pres: %s -> Adjusted: %s (QC Factor: %.1f%%)" % (raw_value, adjusted_preservative, qc_factor_pres))
	logger.info("RAW Bio: %s -> Adjusted: %s (QC Factor: %.1f%%)" % (raw_cobioside, adjusted_cobioside, qc_factor_bio))

	# Write ADJUSTED values to output tags
	system.tag.writeBlocking([
		full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Preservative Adjusted",
		full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Co Bioside RAW",
		full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Assay Co Bioside Adjusted"
	], [adjusted_preservative, raw_cobioside, adjusted_cobioside])

	logger.info("Successfully wrote adjusted assay values")

	# === Pass/Fail Evaluation ===
	try:
		chargeNumber = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Chemical Usage/Charge Number"])[0].value
		if chargeNumber:
			result = qualityControl.passfail.evaluatePassFail(full_tag_path, db_name, chargeNumber, debug=True)
			logger.info("Pass/Fail result: %s" % str(result))
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Pass/Fail evaluation error: %s" % str(e))

		qc_factor_bio = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/QC Factor Co Boiside"])[0].value
		ratio = system.tag.readBlocking([full_tag_path + "/Quality Control/Ratio Co Bioside"])[0].value
		
		if qc_factor_pres is None or qc_factor_bio is None or ratio is None:
			logger.error("One or more QC factors/ratio is None")
			return
	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Error reading QC factors: %s" % str(e))

	# Check for chemicals that have NO co-biocide calculation:

	# - BORATE / DOT / BORON
	chem_name_tag = full_tag_path + "/Chemical Usage/Chemical Name[1]"
	skip_cobioside = False
	try:
		chem_name_result = system.tag.readBlocking([chem_name_tag])[0]
		if chem_name_result.quality.isGood():

			# ECO (but not EL2) has no co-biocide
			is_eco = "ECO" in chem_upper and "EL2" not in chem_upper
			
			# Borate chemicals have no co-biocide

	except Exception as e:
		logger.error("Error reading Chemical Name[1]: %s" % str(e))

	# Apply QC Factor to redrill preservative

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        cylinder = currentValue.value
        
        if cylinder == 1:
            query = "SELECT CylinderVoid FROM Treat WHERE Cylinder = 1"
            void_volume = system.db.runScalarQuery(query)
            tag_path = "[.]Add New Item Cylinder Void"
            system.tag.writeBlocking([tag_path], [void_volume])
        
        elif cylinder == 2:
            query = "SELECT CylinderVoid FROM Treat WHERE Cylinder = 2"
            void_volume = system.db.runScalarQuery(query)
            tag_path = "[.]Add New Item Cylinder Void"
            system.tag.writeBlocking([tag_path], [void_volume])	
            
        elif cylinder == 3:
            query = "SELECT CylinderVoid FROM Treat WHERE Cylinder = 3"
            void_volume = system.db.runScalarQuery(query)
            tag_path = "[.]Add New Item Cylinder Void"
            system.tag.writeBlocking([tag_path], [void_volume])
